criteria.description: Python dependencies install without errors from repository root (requirements.txt present on target branch).
criteria.verification: From repo root: `python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt` (or use project venv per repo rules). Exit code 0.

criteria.description: PR review deliverable includes a 2–3 line summary of what PR #97 changes.
criteria.verification: Read the review output: confirm it states scope in 2–3 lines (e.g. agentic NIM agent, CI workflow, refactors, manifests).

criteria.description: Review explicitly calls out critical issues: bugs, edge cases, breaking changes, security, performance.
criteria.verification: Check review has a dedicated section or bullets for each category above; each item is concrete (file/area referenced).

criteria.description: Review covers repo-specific aspects: dataloop.json impacts, hardcoded values, backward compatibility, and tests.
criteria.verification: Confirm mentions of `dataloop.json` (or manifest) changes, env/defaults, compatibility with existing models, and `agent/tests/` or `test/` coverage.

criteria.description: Feedback is actionable with suggested fixes (not vague praise only).
criteria.verification: Each major finding includes a suggested fix or next step.

criteria.description: Agent unit tests pass after dependency install.
criteria.verification: From repo root with deps installed: `python -m pytest agent/tests/test_agent.py -q` (adjust path if project uses different runner). Exit code 0.
